title: Containers on Amazon ECS with Mama J
summary: AWS Developers video explaining containerization, Docker basics, and Amazon ECS orchestration. Covers the problem containers solve, VM vs container differences, ECS as an orchestrator, and Fargate vs EC2 deployment options with a shopping app example.
writeup: This AWS Developers video walks through containerization fundamentals and how Amazon ECS orchestrates containers in production. It frames the problem containers solve, contrasts virtual machines with containers, covers Docker basics, and positions ECS as the orchestrator that manages running containers. The concrete takeaways center on the two ECS deployment models, Fargate and EC2, illustrated with a shopping app example, along with auto-scaling as a way to handle changing load.
